name: Sinda Ltd.
business: Sinda Ltd. is a silver exploration company focused on the Sinda Property in Mexico, which consists of multiple vein systems with high-grade silver and gold mineralization. The company has not yet established mineral reserves and is in the exploration stage.

exposures.sentence: Demand for silver is driven by its general perception as a store of value as well as its uses in industrial processes and products, such as solar panels, superconductors, personal electronics, electric vehicles, sensors, photovoltaic cells and corrosive-resistant welding, and other emergent themes including artificial intelligence, nano silver and biocides.
